commands.review_summary:
The PR renders complete assistant and expanded tool-result HTML documents in Control UI chat through a sandboxed `srcdoc` iframe, keeps the source in a disclosure, adds styles, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +242, Tests +367. Total +609 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows `findFirstHtmlStartTag` stops at the first `>` byte, so a valid quoted-attribute start tag can keep the CSP meta text inside an attribute. I did not run a browser reproduction because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can harden the tag scanner and tests; maintainer security-boundary acceptance remains the follow-up decision after that repair.
